def: Of or pertaining to a natural order of plants (Polemoniaceæ),which includes Polemonium, Phlox, Gilia, and a few other genera.
A wig having a tie or ties, or one having some of the curlstied up; also, a wig tied upon the head. Wright. V. Knox.
An artifical red nitrogenous dyestuff, called also redcoralline.
A round and compact bed of ore, or a distinct bed, notcommunicating with a vein.
Not vernacular.A nonvernacular expression. Sir W. Hamilton.
